plan.command: google-business-profile-safe-cli legacy-v49 accounts locations transfer --name accounts/123/locations/456 --to-account accounts/999
risk_reasons: Legacy v4.9 location transfer changes account ownership for a location.
preconditions: Google still permits this deprecated v4.9 method for the target account.
verification_plan: List source and destination account locations with readMask=name. Transfer succeeds only if the business-info location disappears from source and appears in destination.

rollback.notes: No automated rollback; preserve snapshots before apply for manual recovery.
